Name: Nike Air Max 90
Summary: Iconic running shoe with visible Air cushioning.
Description: The Nike Air Max 90 stays true to its OG roots with the iconic Waffle outsole, stitched overlays, and classic TPU accents. Fresh colors give a modern look while Max Air cushioning adds comfort.

Name: Adidas Ultraboost 22
Summary: High-performance running shoe with Boost midsole technology.
Description: The Adidas Ultraboost 22 delivers incredible energy return with every stride. Featuring a Primeknit upper and responsive Boost cushioning, it's built for runners who demand the best.

Name: Apple MacBook Pro 16
Summary: Professional laptop with M3 Pro chip for demanding workflows.
Description: The MacBook Pro 16-inch features the powerful M3 Pro chip, a stunning Liquid Retina XDR display, and up to 22 hours of battery life. Perfect for developers, designers, and content creators.

Name: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
Summary: Flagship smartphone with built-in S Pen and AI features.
Description: The Galaxy S24 Ultra brings Galaxy AI to your fingertips with a titanium frame, 200MP camera, and an embedded S Pen. Experience the brightest display Samsung has ever made.

Name: Sony WH-1000XM5
Summary: Industry-leading noise cancelling wireless headphones.
Description: The Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones offer best-in-class noise cancellation with an ultra-comfortable design. With 30-hour battery life and crystal-clear call quality, these are the ultimate premium headphones.

Name: Dell XPS 15
Summary: Premium 15-inch laptop with InfinityEdge display.
Description: The Dell XPS 15 combines a stunning 15.6-inch OLED display with powerful Intel processors and NVIDIA graphics. Its compact design and premium build make it ideal for professionals on the go.

Name: Apple iPhone 15 Pro
Summary: Pro-grade smartphone with titanium design and A17 Pro chip.
Description: iPhone 15 Pro features a lightweight titanium design, the powerful A17 Pro chip, and an advanced 48MP camera system. With USB-C and Action Button, it's the most capable iPhone ever.

Name: Bose QuietComfort Ultra
Summary: Premium noise cancelling headphones with spatial audio.
Description: Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones deliver world-class noise cancellation and immersive spatial audio. CustomTune technology personalizes the sound to your ears for an unmatched listening experience.

Name: Nike Air Jordan 1 Retro High
Summary: Classic basketball sneaker with premium leather construction.
Description: The Air Jordan 1 Retro High OG is the shoe that started it all. Featuring premium leather, Air-Sole cushioning, and the iconic Wings logo, this sneaker continues to define streetwear culture.

Name: Samsung Galaxy Tab S9
Summary: Premium Android tablet with Dynamic AMOLED display.
Description: The Galaxy Tab S9 offers a stunning 11-inch Dynamic AMOLED display, Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 processor, and IP68 water resistance. Includes S Pen for productivity and creativity.

Name: Apple iPad Air M2
Summary: Versatile tablet powered by the M2 chip.
Description: The iPad Air with M2 chip delivers powerful performance in a lightweight design. With a 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display and Apple Pencil support, it's perfect for work and play.

Name: Dyson V15 Detect
Summary: Intelligent cordless vacuum with laser dust detection.
Description: The Dyson V15 Detect uses a laser to reveal microscopic dust and an LCD screen to show real-time particle counts. Powerful suction and up to 60 minutes of runtime make cleaning effortless.

Name: Levi's 501 Original Fit Jeans
Summary: The iconic straight-leg jean that started it all.
Description: Levi's 501 Original Fit jeans feature a button fly, straight leg, and sit at the waist. Made from durable denim, these timeless jeans are the foundation of every great wardrobe.

Name: Canon EOS R6 Mark II
Summary: Full-frame mirrorless camera with exceptional autofocus.
Description: The Canon EOS R6 Mark II offers 24.2MP resolution, up to 40fps continuous shooting, and advanced Dual Pixel CMOS AF II. Ideal for both photography and 4K 60p video recording.

Name: North Face Nuptse Jacket
Summary: Classic 700-fill down insulated jacket for cold weather.
Description: The North Face 1996 Retro Nuptse Jacket is an icon of warmth with 700-fill goose down insulation. Water-resistant ripstop fabric and a stowable hood keep you protected in harsh conditions.

Name: Logitech MX Master 3S
Summary: Advanced wireless mouse for productivity and precision.
Description: The Logitech MX Master 3S features an 8K DPI sensor, quiet clicks, and MagSpeed scroll. Works on any surface including glass and connects to up to three devices simultaneously.

Name: KitchenAid Artisan Stand Mixer
Summary: Iconic stand mixer with 10 speeds and tilt-head design.
Description: The KitchenAid Artisan Stand Mixer features a 5-quart stainless steel bowl, 10 mixing speeds, and a powerful motor. Compatible with over 10 optional attachments for endless culinary possibilities.

Name: Sony PlayStation 5
Summary: Next-generation gaming console with lightning-fast SSD.
Description: The PlayStation 5 delivers a new era of gaming with its custom SSD, ray tracing, and DualSense controller with haptic feedback. Experience stunning 4K graphics and near-instant load times.

Name: Ray-Ban Wayfarer Classic
Summary: Timeless sunglasses with iconic design since 1956.
Description: The Ray-Ban Wayfarer is the most recognizable style in sunglasses history. Featuring a classic acetate frame, crystal green lenses, and UV protection, it's a wardrobe essential.

Name: Herman Miller Aeron Chair
Summary: Ergonomic office chair engineered for all-day comfort.
Description: The Herman Miller Aeron is the gold standard of ergonomic seating. With adjustable PostureFit SL support, 8Z Pellicle mesh, and three size options, it supports healthy sitting for up to 12 hours.

Name: Puma RS-X Reinvention
Summary: Retro-inspired running shoe with bold design elements.
Description: The Puma RS-X Reinvention reimagines the classic Running System with bold colorways and chunky design. SoftFoam+ sockliner provides comfortable cushioning for all-day wear.

Name: Apple Watch Series 9
Summary: Advanced smartwatch with health monitoring and S9 chip.
Description: Apple Watch Series 9 features the new S9 chip, a brighter display, and a double-tap gesture. Track your health with blood oxygen, ECG, and temperature sensing capabilities.

Name: Garmin Fenix 7X
Summary: Rugged multisport GPS smartwatch for outdoor adventures.
Description: The Garmin Fenix 7X offers a 1.4-inch display, solar charging, multi-band GPS, and over 30 built-in sports apps. With up to 37 days of battery life, it's built for the most demanding adventures.

Name: JBL Charge 5
Summary: Portable Bluetooth speaker with powerful bass and IP67 rating.
Description: The JBL Charge 5 delivers bold sound with its optimized long-excursion driver and dual bass radiators. IP67 waterproof and dustproof, with 20 hours of battery and built-in power bank.

Name: Osprey Atmos AG 65
Summary: Premium hiking backpack with Anti-Gravity suspension.
Description: The Osprey Atmos AG 65 features the revolutionary Anti-Gravity suspension system that distributes weight evenly across your hips and back. Includes rain cover, hydration sleeve, and multiple pockets.

Name: Lenovo ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11
Summary: Ultra-lightweight business laptop with military-grade durability.
Description: The ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11 weighs just 2.48 lbs and features Intel 13th Gen processors, a 14-inch 2.8K OLED display, and up to 15 hours of battery life. Built to pass MIL-STD-810H tests.

Name: Under Armour Curry 11
Summary: Steph Curry's signature basketball shoe with UA Flow cushioning.
Description: The Curry 11 features UA Flow cushioning for court feel and traction without a rubber outsole. Warp upper technology provides lightweight lockdown support for quick cuts and crossovers.

Name: Nespresso Vertuo Next
Summary: Coffee and espresso machine with centrifusion technology.
Description: The Nespresso Vertuo Next brews five cup sizes from espresso to carafe using centrifusion technology. Barcode recognition automatically adjusts brewing parameters for each capsule.

Name: GoPro HERO12 Black
Summary: Waterproof action camera with HyperSmooth 6.0 stabilization.
Description: GoPro HERO12 Black captures stunning 5.3K video at 60fps and 27MP photos. HyperSmooth 6.0 stabilization ensures buttery-smooth footage. Waterproof to 33ft without housing.

Name: Converse Chuck Taylor All Star
Summary: Classic canvas sneaker that defines casual style.
Description: The Converse Chuck Taylor All Star is the original basketball shoe turned cultural icon. Featuring durable canvas upper, rubber toe cap, and the signature All Star ankle patch.

Name: Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro
Summary: Premium mechanical keyboard with Razer Green switches.
Description: The Razer BlackWidow V4 Pro features clicky Green switches, a command dial, and Chroma RGB across 6 lighting zones. Magnetic wrist rest and media controls enhance the gaming experience.

Name: Yeti Rambler 26oz Bottle
Summary: Double-wall vacuum insulated stainless steel water bottle.
Description: The Yeti Rambler 26oz keeps drinks cold for hours with double-wall vacuum insulation. Made from 18/8 stainless steel with a dishwasher-safe Chug Cap for easy drinking.

Name: Patagonia Better Sweater Fleece Jacket
Summary: Warm recycled polyester fleece jacket with classic styling.
Description: The Patagonia Better Sweater is made from 100% recycled polyester fleece with a sweater-knit face. Features a stand-up collar, zippered hand-warmer pockets, and Fair Trade Certified sewn.

Name: ASUS ROG Swift PG279QM
Summary: 27-inch 1440p gaming monitor with 240Hz refresh rate.
Description: The ASUS ROG Swift PG279QM delivers a 27-inch QHD IPS panel at 240Hz with 1ms response time. NVIDIA G-SYNC and HDR 400 support ensure smooth, vivid gaming visuals.

Name: Vitamix A3500
Summary: Professional-grade smart blender with touchscreen controls.
Description: The Vitamix A3500 features a built-in digital timer, variable speed control, and five program settings. Self-cleaning and powerful enough to blend anything from smoothies to hot soups.

Name: New Balance 990v6
Summary: Premium made-in-USA running shoe with ENCAP midsole.
Description: The New Balance 990v6 continues the legacy of American-made excellence. FuelCell midsole and ENCAP support deliver the perfect blend of comfort and stability for everyday wear.

Name: Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5 RAM
Summary: High-performance DDR5 memory with dynamic RGB lighting.
Description: Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5 32GB kit delivers speeds up to 6000MHz with tight timings. Ten individually addressable RGB LEDs per module and Intel XMP 3.0 support for easy overclocking.

Name: Samsonite Freeform 28" Spinner
Summary: Lightweight hardside luggage with 360-degree spinner wheels.
Description: The Samsonite Freeform features a polycarbonate shell that flexes to absorb impact. Four multi-directional spinner wheels, TSA lock, and organized interior make travel hassle-free.

Name: Nikon Z8
Summary: Professional full-frame mirrorless camera with 45.7MP sensor.
Description: The Nikon Z8 packs Z9-level performance into a compact body. Stacked CMOS sensor delivers 45.7MP stills, 8K video, and 120fps burst shooting with real-time subject detection AF.

Name: Ralph Lauren Classic Fit Polo
Summary: Signature cotton mesh polo shirt with embroidered pony.
Description: The Ralph Lauren Classic Fit Polo is crafted from breathable cotton mesh with a ribbed collar and armbands. The signature embroidered Pony at the chest defines preppy American style.

Name: Weber Spirit II E-310
Summary: Three-burner gas grill with GS4 grilling system.
Description: The Weber Spirit II E-310 features the GS4 grilling system with Infinity Ignition, Flavorizer bars, and a grease management system. 529 sq in of cooking space for the ultimate backyard BBQ.

Name: Hoka Clifton 9
Summary: Lightweight cushioned running shoe for everyday training.
Description: The Hoka Clifton 9 delivers a plush ride with a compression-molded EVA midsole. Lighter than its predecessor with an improved breathable mesh upper for maximum comfort on long runs.

Name: LG C3 65" OLED TV
Summary: 65-inch OLED TV with perfect blacks and Dolby Vision.
Description: The LG C3 OLED TV delivers stunning picture quality with self-lit pixels and Dolby Vision. Alpha 9 Gen 6 processor optimizes content in real time. Ideal for movies, sports, and gaming at 4K 120Hz.

Name: DeWalt 20V MAX Drill/Driver Kit
Summary: Compact cordless drill with lithium-ion battery.
Description: The DeWalt 20V MAX drill/driver delivers 300 unit watts out of power with a compact design. Features a high-speed transmission, LED light, and includes two 20V MAX batteries and charger.

Name: Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless
Summary: Audiophile-grade wireless headphones with 60-hour battery.
Description: The Sennheiser Momentum 4 Wireless delivers exceptional sound with 42mm transducers and adaptive noise cancellation. Premium leather and fabric materials ensure luxurious comfort for up to 60 hours.

Name: Google Pixel 8 Pro
Summary: AI-powered smartphone with Tensor G3 chip and pro camera.
Description: The Pixel 8 Pro features the Google Tensor G3 chip with built-in AI capabilities. Triple rear camera system with 50MP main sensor delivers stunning photos. Seven years of OS and security updates.

Name: Lululemon Align High-Rise Pant
Summary: Buttery-soft yoga leggings with Nulu fabric.
Description: The Lululemon Align pant is designed for yoga with lightweight Nulu fabric that feels like a second skin. High-rise waistband, four-way stretch, and no front seam for distraction-free movement.

Name: Breville Barista Express
Summary: All-in-one espresso machine with built-in grinder.
Description: The Breville Barista Express features a built-in conical burr grinder, digital temperature control, and a 15-bar Italian pump. Go from beans to espresso in under a minute.

Name: Vans Old Skool
Summary: Classic skate shoe with signature side stripe.
Description: The Vans Old Skool is the first shoe to bear the iconic side stripe. Durable canvas and suede upper with padded collars for comfort. Vulcanized rubber sole provides superior board feel.

Name: Sonos Era 300
Summary: Spatial audio smart speaker with Dolby Atmos support.
Description: The Sonos Era 300 features six drivers arranged in a unique design to deliver immersive Dolby Atmos spatial audio. Supports WiFi, Bluetooth, and AirPlay 2 with Trueplay room tuning.

Name: Columbia Watertight II Rain Jacket
Summary: Lightweight waterproof rain jacket with Omni-Tech technology.
Description: The Columbia Watertight II features Omni-Tech waterproof breathable fabric. Packable design with attached adjustable hood, zippered hand pockets, and elastic cuffs for reliable rain protection.

Name: Callaway Rogue ST Max Driver
Summary: Forgiving driver with AI-designed Jailbreak Speed Frame.
Description: The Callaway Rogue ST Max features an AI-designed Jailbreak Speed Frame and tungsten speed cartridge for maximum ball speed and forgiveness. Flash Face SS22 technology optimizes performance across the entire face.

Name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1
Summary: Multi-functional pressure cooker with 7 appliances in one.
Description: The Instant Pot Duo replaces 7 kitchen appliances: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, sauté pan, yogurt maker, and warmer. 6-quart capacity with 13 one-touch programs.

Name: Oakley Holbrook Sunglasses
Summary: Sports sunglasses with Prizm lens technology.
Description: Oakley Holbrook sunglasses feature Plutonite lenses with Prizm technology for enhanced color and contrast. Lightweight O Matter frame with three-point fit for comfort and optical clarity.

Name: Microsoft Surface Pro 9
Summary: Versatile 2-in-1 tablet with Intel 12th Gen processor.
Description: The Surface Pro 9 combines the power of a laptop with the flexibility of a tablet. Features a 13-inch PixelSense display, Intel 12th Gen i7, and up to 15.5 hours of battery life.

Name: Ninja Foodi Air Fryer
Summary: 6-in-1 digital air fryer with large capacity basket.
Description: The Ninja Foodi Air Fryer crisps, roasts, reheats, and dehydrates with up to 75% less fat than traditional frying. 5.5-quart ceramic-coated basket and digital display with 6 cooking functions.

Name: Casio G-Shock GA-2100
Summary: Tough analog-digital watch with carbon core guard.
Description: The Casio G-Shock GA-2100 features a carbon core guard structure in a slim octagonal design. 200m water resistance, world time, and shock resistance make it perfect for daily wear.

Name: Anker PowerCore 26800mAh
Summary: High-capacity portable charger with dual USB ports.
Description: The Anker PowerCore 26800 packs a massive 26800mAh capacity to charge an iPhone over 6 times. Dual USB ports, PowerIQ technology, and VoltageBoost ensure fast, efficient charging.

Name: Tommy Hilfiger Essential Down Jacket
Summary: Classic puffer jacket with premium down insulation.
Description: The Tommy Hilfiger Essential Down Jacket features premium down fill and a water-resistant shell. Signature flag logo and ribbed cuffs complete the classic American sportswear look.

Name: HP Spectre x360 14
Summary: Convertible 2-in-1 laptop with OLED touchscreen.
Description: The HP Spectre x360 14 features a 13.5-inch 3K2K OLED display, Intel Evo platform, and gem-cut design. 360-degree hinge converts between laptop, tent, and tablet modes.

Name: Coleman Sundome 4-Person Tent
Summary: Easy-setup camping tent with WeatherTec system.
Description: The Coleman Sundome sets up in about 10 minutes with continuous pole sleeves. WeatherTec system with welded floors and inverted seams keeps you dry. Large windows provide ventilation.

Name: Beats Studio Pro Wireless
Summary: Premium wireless headphones with personalized spatial audio.
Description: Beats Studio Pro delivers powerful sound with custom acoustic platform and personalized spatial audio with dynamic head tracking. Up to 40 hours of battery life with USB-C and 3.5mm connectivity.

Name: Dyson Supersonic Hair Dryer
Summary: High-speed hair dryer with intelligent heat control.
Description: The Dyson Supersonic measures air temperature 40 times per second to prevent extreme heat damage. V9 digital motor produces a high-velocity jet of controlled air for fast drying.

Name: On Cloud 5
Summary: Lightweight everyday sneaker with CloudTec cushioning.
Description: The On Cloud 5 features CloudTec cushioning pods for a soft landing and firm takeoff. Speedboard energy plate and breathable mesh upper make it ideal for all-day comfort.

Name: Xiaomi 14 Ultra
Summary: Camera-centric flagship phone co-engineered with Leica.
Description: The Xiaomi 14 Ultra features a Leica Summilux quad camera system with a 1-inch main sensor. Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, 120W HyperCharge, and IP68 rating deliver flagship performance.

Name: IKEA KALLAX Shelf Unit
Summary: Versatile storage shelf with clean geometric design.
Description: The IKEA KALLAX shelf unit can be placed vertically or horizontally as a bookshelf, display unit, or room divider. Compatible with KALLAX inserts for customized storage solutions.

Name: Wilson Pro Staff 97 v14
Summary: Classic player's tennis racket with premium feel.
Description: The Wilson Pro Staff 97 v14 delivers precise control and feel with Braided Graphite and Kevlar construction. 97 sq in head size and 16x19 string pattern for spin and touch.

Name: TP-Link Archer AX73
Summary: WiFi 6 dual-band router with 5400Mbps speeds.
Description: The TP-Link Archer AX73 delivers WiFi 6 speeds up to 5400Mbps with 6 high-gain antennas. OFDMA and MU-MIMO technology support 200+ connected devices for a congestion-free network.

Name: Calvin Klein Slim Fit Dress Shirt
Summary: Modern slim fit non-iron dress shirt in cotton.
Description: The Calvin Klein slim fit dress shirt features non-iron fabric technology for a crisp look all day. Spread collar, French placket, and adjustable cuffs deliver refined sophistication.

Name: Steelcase Leap V2 Chair
Summary: Adaptive ergonomic office chair with LiveBack technology.
Description: The Steelcase Leap V2 features LiveBack technology that mimics the movement of your spine. Natural Glide System, adjustable arms, and flexible seat edge deliver all-day ergonomic comfort.

Name: Brooks Ghost 15
Summary: Neutral cushioned road running shoe for daily training.
Description: The Brooks Ghost 15 features DNA LOFT cushioning and a smooth transition from heel to toe. Engineered mesh upper provides breathability and a secure fit mile after mile.

Name: De'Longhi La Specialista Maestro
Summary: Premium espresso machine with smart tamping and grinding.
Description: The De'Longhi La Specialista Maestro features sensor grinding technology and smart tamping station. Dual heating system allows simultaneous espresso extraction and milk frothing.

Name: Herschel Little America Backpack
Summary: Classic mountaineering-inspired backpack with laptop sleeve.
Description: The Herschel Little America features a signature mountaineering style with a drawstring closure and magnetic strap. Padded 15-inch laptop sleeve, fleece-lined sunglasses pocket, and 25L capacity.

Name: Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro
Summary: Ultra-lightweight wireless gaming mouse with Focus Pro sensor.
Description: The Razer DeathAdder V3 Pro weighs just 63g with the Focus Pro 30K optical sensor. HyperSpeed wireless, 90-hour battery life, and ergonomic shape provide a competitive gaming advantage.

Name: Philips Sonicare DiamondClean 9300
Summary: Premium smart electric toothbrush with app connectivity.
Description: The Philips Sonicare DiamondClean 9300 delivers 62,000 brush strokes per minute with four brushing modes. Smart pressure sensor and app-connected coaching ensure optimal cleaning technique.

Name: Spalding NBA Official Game Ball
Summary: Official game basketball with premium Horween leather.
Description: The Spalding NBA Official Game Ball is crafted from exclusive Horween leather for superior grip and feel. Full-grain leather cover and wide channel design deliver consistent bounce and handling.

Name: Dyson Pure Cool Air Purifier
Summary: HEPA air purifier and fan with real-time air quality display.
Description: The Dyson Pure Cool captures 99.97% of particles as small as 0.3 microns with sealed HEPA and activated carbon filters. LCD screen displays real-time air quality and connects via Dyson Link app.

Name: OnePlus 12
Summary: Flagship smartphone with Hasselblad camera and 100W charging.
Description: The OnePlus 12 features a 4th gen Hasselblad camera system, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3, and a 2K 120Hz ProXDR display. 100W SUPERVOOC flash charge delivers a full charge in just 26 minutes.

Name: Bosch 18V Impact Driver
Summary: Compact brushless impact driver with 1800 in-lbs torque.
Description: The Bosch 18V impact driver features a brushless motor delivering 1800 in-lbs of torque. Three speed settings, built-in LED light, and compact design make it ideal for tight spaces.

Name: Corsair K70 RGB Pro
Summary: Premium mechanical gaming keyboard with Cherry MX switches.
Description: The Corsair K70 RGB Pro features Cherry MX switches, per-key RGB backlighting, and 8000Hz hyper-polling. Aircraft-grade aluminum frame and PBT double-shot keycaps ensure lasting durability.

Name: Seiko Presage Cocktail Time
Summary: Elegant automatic dress watch with textured dial.
Description: The Seiko Presage Cocktail Time features a stunning textured dial inspired by cocktails. Japanese automatic 4R35 movement, Hardlex crystal, and stainless steel case with 50m water resistance.

Name: Burberry Kensington Trench Coat
Summary: Iconic heritage trench coat in gabardine cotton.
Description: The Burberry Kensington trench coat is crafted from waterproof gabardine, a fabric invented by Thomas Burberry. Signature check lining, horn-look buttons, and belted waist define British elegance.

Name: Hydro Flask 32oz Wide Mouth
Summary: Insulated stainless steel water bottle with Flex Cap.
Description: The Hydro Flask 32oz Wide Mouth keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12 hours with TempShield insulation. BPA-free, dishwasher-safe Flex Cap, and available in dozens of colors.

Name: Asics Gel-Kayano 30
Summary: Premium stability running shoe with FF Blast Plus cushioning.
Description: The Asics Gel-Kayano 30 features FF Blast Plus Eco cushioning and a 4D Guidance System for stability runners. LITE truss technology and engineered mesh deliver support and breathability.

Name: Marshall Stanmore III
Summary: Iconic Bluetooth speaker with powerful room-filling sound.
Description: The Marshall Stanmore III delivers rich, powerful sound with a 15W tweeter and two 40W woofers. Classic vinyl-wrapped design, brass details, and multi-host connectivity honor the rock heritage.

Name: Cuisinart 14-Cup Food Processor
Summary: Powerful food processor with 720-watt motor and BPA-free work bowl.
Description: The Cuisinart 14-Cup Food Processor features a powerful motor, stainless steel blades, and multiple disc attachments. SealTight Advantage System ensures no leaking during processing.

Name: Panasonic Lumix S5 II
Summary: Full-frame mirrorless camera with phase-detect AF.
Description: The Panasonic Lumix S5 II introduces phase-detect autofocus to the Lumix lineup. 24.2MP full-frame sensor, 6K video, and in-body stabilization make it perfect for hybrid shooters.

Name: Reebok Classic Leather
Summary: Heritage sneaker with soft leather and EVA midsole.
Description: The Reebok Classic Leather is a timeless silhouette with a soft garment leather upper and die-cut EVA midsole for lightweight cushioning. Clean lines make it a versatile everyday shoe.

Name: Belkin MagSafe 3-in-1 Wireless Charger
Summary: Wireless charging stand for iPhone, Apple Watch, and AirPods.
Description: The Belkin MagSafe 3-in-1 charges your iPhone 15W, Apple Watch, and AirPods simultaneously. Official MagSafe certification ensures perfect alignment and fast charging every time.

Name: Titleist Pro V1 Golf Balls
Summary: Tour-performance golf ball with exceptional distance and spin.
Description: The Titleist Pro V1 delivers exceptional distance, consistent flight, and Drop-and-Stop short game control. Spherically-tiled 388 dimple design optimizes aerodynamics for penetrating trajectory.

Name: Fossil Gen 6 Smartwatch
Summary: Wear OS smartwatch with Snapdragon 4100+ platform.
Description: The Fossil Gen 6 runs Wear OS with Snapdragon 4100+ for faster performance. Heart rate, SpO2, and sleep tracking with always-on display. Interchangeable straps and classic watch styling.

Name: Saucony Endorphin Speed 3
Summary: Race-day training shoe with SPEEDROLL technology.
Description: The Saucony Endorphin Speed 3 features a nylon plate and PWRRUN PB cushioning for an explosive ride. SPEEDROLL geometry propels you forward with effortless speed on race day and tempo runs.

Name: Bang & Olufsen Beoplay H95
Summary: Ultra-luxury wireless headphones with titanium driver.
Description: The B&O Beoplay H95 features custom-designed 40mm titanium drivers and advanced adaptive noise cancellation. Crafted from premium materials including lambskin leather and aluminum for audiophile-grade sound.

Name: Makita 18V LXT Circular Saw
Summary: Cordless 6.5-inch circular saw with brushless motor.
Description: The Makita 18V LXT circular saw features a brushless motor for extended runtime. 6.5-inch blade, 0-50 degree bevel capacity, and Star Protection Computer Controls prevent overloading.

Name: Gucci Ace Sneakers
Summary: Luxury leather sneakers with iconic Web stripe detail.
Description: The Gucci Ace sneakers feature premium white leather construction with the signature green-red-green Web stripe. Embroidered bee detail and rubber sole make these a luxury streetwear staple.

Name: Acer Predator XB273K Monitor
Summary: 27-inch 4K gaming monitor with 144Hz and G-SYNC.
Description: The Acer Predator XB273K delivers crisp 4K UHD visuals at 144Hz with NVIDIA G-SYNC. Quantum dot technology provides 90% DCI-P3 color coverage for vivid, accurate gaming visuals.

Name: Crocs Classic Clog
Summary: Lightweight comfort clog with ventilation ports.
Description: The Crocs Classic Clog features Croslite foam construction that is lightweight, flexible, and 360-degree comfort. Ventilation ports and pivoting heel straps make them easy to wear anywhere.

Name: Birkenstock Arizona Sandal
Summary: Classic two-strap sandal with contoured cork footbed.
Description: The Birkenstock Arizona features the legendary contoured cork-latex footbed that molds to your foot over time. Adjustable buckle straps and suede lining provide a custom, comfortable fit.

Name: Netgear Nighthawk AX12
Summary: Tri-band WiFi 6 router with 12-stream support.
Description: The Netgear Nighthawk AX12 delivers up to 10.8Gbps with WiFi 6 tri-band technology. Supports 12 simultaneous streams and covers up to 3500 sq ft for the ultimate connected home.

Name: Stanley Classic Vacuum Bottle 1.5qt
Summary: Legendary insulated bottle with lifetime warranty.
Description: The Stanley Classic Vacuum Bottle keeps drinks hot for 24 hours or cold for 32 hours. Double-wall vacuum insulation, BPA-free construction, and rust-proof stainless steel backed by a lifetime warranty.
